home.newsForYouSubtitle: Matched by your crop, state, and district when available.
home.noNewsBody: We are checking trusted agriculture sources. Useful updates will appear here shortly.
home.weatherLoadingBody: Add taluka, district, and state in your profile for accurate forecasts.

heavy_rain.recommendation: Avoid pesticide spraying and keep drainage channels open.

rain.recommendation: Delay spraying and fertilizer application until the rain window passes.

heatwave.recommendation: Irrigate early morning or evening and avoid mid-day spraying.

strong_wind.recommendation: Support vegetable creepers and avoid field spraying in windy hours.

whitefly_risk.message: High humidity can increase whitefly risk in cotton.
whitefly_risk.recommendation: Inspect leaf undersides and avoid excess irrigation.

rice_drainage.message: Rain may increase water levels in rice fields.
rice_drainage.recommendation: Maintain bunds and drain excess water from young seedlings.

vegetable_wind_risk.message: Vegetable crops may face wind damage.
vegetable_wind_risk.recommendation: Check staking, trellis support, and nursery covers.

safe_weather.recommendation: Continue normal field monitoring and irrigation planning.

insights.avoidSpray: Avoid pesticide spray before expected rain.
insights.sprayOk: Spray window looks manageable if wind stays low.
insights.humidityHigh: High humidity means closer pest and disease scouting is needed.
insights.humidityOk: Humidity risk is moderate right now.
insights.heatHigh: Plan irrigation during cooler hours to reduce heat stress.
